017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.function.Suppliers.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.HttpPartType.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.AnnotationTraversal.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isNotEmpty;
026import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
027import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestServerConstants.*;
028import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.RestUtils.*;
029
030import java.lang.annotation.*;
031import java.lang.reflect.Method;
032import java.nio.charset.*;
033import java.util.*;
034import java.util.concurrent.*;
035import java.util.function.*;
036import java.util.stream.*;
037
038import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
041import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
042import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
043import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
044import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
045import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
046import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
047import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
048import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
049import org.apache.juneau.http.part.*;
050import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
051import org.apache.juneau.httppart.bean.*;
052import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
053import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;
054import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
055import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
056import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
057import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
058import org.apache.juneau.rest.common.utils.*;
059import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.*;
060import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug.*;
061import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard.*;
062import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.*;
063import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
064import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.matcher.*;
065import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.*;
066
067import jakarta.servlet.*;
068import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
069
070/**
071 * Represents a single Java servlet/resource method annotated with {@link RestOp @RestOp}.
072 *
073 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
074 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
075 * </ul>
076 *
077 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
078 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestOpContext">RestOpContext</a>
079 * </ul>
080 */
081@SuppressWarnings({
082   "rawtypes",
083   "java:S112",  // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle methods throughout this class
084   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_defaultRequestFormData)
085   "java:S1200", // High coupling is intentional in this central operation context aggregator.
086   "java:S6539", // RestOpContext intentionally centralizes op wiring and annotation resolution.
087   "resource"   // op-level BasicBeanStores are short-lived scratch stores; the long-lived opBeanStore field is owned and closed by the parent RestContext via its bean-store hierarchy.
088})
089public class RestOpContext extends Context implements Comparable<RestOpContext> {
090
091   // Property name constants
092   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestFormData = "defaultRequestFormData";
093   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestHeaders = "defaultRequestHeaders";
094   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestQueryData = "defaultRequestQueryData";
095   private static final String PROP_httpMethod = "httpMethod";
096
097   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
098
099   private static final AnnotationProvider AP = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
100
101   /**
102    * Env-driven default charset for this operation, populated by {@link ClassInfo#inject(Object, BeanStore)}
103    * before the {@link #defaultCharset} memoizer fires; resolved from {@code RestContext.defaultCharset} or
104    * {@code "UTF-8"}.
105    */
106   @Value("${RestContext.defaultCharset:UTF-8}")
107   private String defaultCharsetName;
108
109   /**
110    * Env-driven default max-input string for this operation, populated by {@link ClassInfo#inject(Object, BeanStore)}
111    * before the {@link #maxInput} memoizer fires; resolved from {@code RestContext.maxInput} or
112    * {@code "100000000"}.
113    */
114   @Value("${RestContext.maxInput:100000000}")
115   private String defaultMaxInputString;
116
117   /**
118    * Internal construction-time state holder.
119    */
120   static class Builder extends Context.Builder {
121
122      private Method restMethod;
123      private RestContext restContext;
124      private Supplier<Object> restResourceSupplier;
125
126      Builder(Method method, RestContext context) {
127         this(method, context, null);
128      }
129
130      Builder(Method method, RestContext context, Supplier<Object> resourceSupplier) {
131
132         this.restContext = context;
133         this.restMethod = method;
134         this.restResourceSupplier = resourceSupplier == null ? context::getResource : resourceSupplier;
135
136         var ap = context.getMarshallingContext().getAnnotationProvider();
137         var mi = MethodInfo.of(context.getResourceClass(), method);
138         var resourceClass = ClassInfo.of(context.getResourceClass());
139
140         try {
141            var vr = context.getVarResolver();
142            var vrs = vr.createSession();
143
144            // Parent-to-child merge: class-level annotations (parent class chain) applied first, then method-level
145            // (matching-methods chain, return type, package). Method annotations thus override class annotations
146            // for the same property. LinkedHashSet deduplicates while preserving order.
147            //
148            // For a mixin op (the op's context is a mixin sub-context), the host's class-level @ContextApply
149            // config (e.g. @HtmlDocConfig, @SerializerConfig) is prepended ahead of the mixin class's own class
150            // annotations, so the effective precedence is method > mixin-class > host-class. This is the
151            // op-level counterpart of the context-level inheritance walk and is gated by @Rest(noInherit) on
152            // the mixin. For non-mixin contexts the host stream is empty (no behavior change).
153            var hostClassAnnotations = context.getInheritedHostClassAnnotations(ap);
154            var declaringClassAnnotations = rstream(ap.find(resourceClass, SELF, PARENTS));
155            var methodAnnotations = rstream(ap.find(mi, SELF, MATCHING_METHODS, RETURN_TYPE, PACKAGE));
156            var allAnnotationsSet = new LinkedHashSet<AnnotationInfo<?>>();
157            hostClassAnnotations.forEach(allAnnotationsSet::add);
158            declaringClassAnnotations.forEach(allAnnotationsSet::add);
159            methodAnnotations.forEach(allAnnotationsSet::add);
160            var work = AnnotationWorkList.of(vrs, allAnnotationsSet.stream().filter(CONTEXT_APPLY_FILTER));
161
162            apply(work);
163
164         } catch (Exception e) {
165            throw new InternalServerError(e);
166         }
167      }
168
169      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
170      public Builder copy() {
171         throw new NoSuchMethodError("Not implemented.");
172      }
173   }
174
175   private static HttpPartSerializer createPartSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> c, HttpPartSerializer defaultSerializer) {
176      return c == null
177         ? defaultSerializer
178         : BeanInstantiator.of(HttpPartSerializer.class).type(c).fallback(() -> defaultSerializer).run();
179   }
180
181   private final WritableBeanStore opBeanStore;
182   protected final Map<Class<?>,ResponseBeanMeta> responseBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
183   protected final Map<Class<?>,ResponsePartMeta> headerPartMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
184   protected final Method method;
185   protected final MethodInfo mi;
186   protected final RestContext context;
187   private final Supplier<Object> resourceSupplier;
188
189   // The annotation work-list produced during construction.
190   private final AnnotationWorkList appliedAnnotations;
191
192   private RestContext restContext() { return context; }
193
194   /**
195    * Returns the {@link RestContext} that owns this operation context.
196    *
197    * <p>
198    * For operations declared directly on the host resource class, returns the host context. For operations
199    * registered through a {@code @Rest(mixins=...)} mixin, returns the per-mixin sub-context (parent-linked
200    * to the host's context via {@link RestContext#getParentContext()}). Callers can use this to identify
201    * whether the operation was contributed by a mixin (via {@link RestContext#isMixinContext()}).
202    *
203    * @return The owning {@link RestContext} for this operation.
204    * @since 10.0.0
205    */
206   public RestContext getContext() { return context; }
207
208   private Method method() { return method; }
209   private MethodInfo methodInfo() { return mi; }
210   private AnnotationWorkList appliedAnnotations() { return appliedAnnotations; }
211   private BeanStore beanStore() { return context.getBeanStore(); }
212   private WritableBeanStore opBeanStore() { return opBeanStore; }
213   private Object resource() { return resourceSupplier.get(); }
214   private VarResolver varResolver() { return context.getVarResolver(); }
215
216   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
217   // Memoized fields
218   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
219
220   /** Effective allowed parser session-option keys for this operation. */
221   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> allowedParserOptions = memoizer(() -> {
222      var l = new ArrayList<String>();
223      var p = PROPERTY_allowedParserOptions;
224      if (isInherited(p))
225         l.addAll(restContext().getAllowedParserOptions());
226      getRestOpAnnotations().stream()
227         .flatMap(ai -> resolveCdl(ai.getStringArray(p).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY)))
228         .forEach(l::add);
229      return u(treeSetCi(removeNegations(l)));
230   });
231
232   /** Effective allowed serializer session-option keys for this operation. */
233   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> allowedSerializerOptions = memoizer(() -> {
234      var l = new ArrayList<String>();
235      var p = PROPERTY_allowedSerializerOptions;
236      if (isInherited(p))
237         l.addAll(restContext().getAllowedSerializerOptions());
238      getRestOpAnnotations().stream()
239         .flatMap(ai -> resolveCdl(ai.getStringArray(p).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY)))
240         .forEach(l::add);
241      return u(treeSetCi(removeNegations(l)));
242   });
243
244   /** The {@link MarshallingContext} for this operation (op-level annotations applied on top of the parent context). */
245   private final Memoizer<MarshallingContext> marshallingContext = memoizer(() -> {
246      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
247      var parent = restContext().getBeanContextBuilder();
248      if (!parent.canApply(aa))
249         return restContext().getMarshallingContext();
250      Holder<MarshallingContext.Builder> v = Holder.of(parent.copy());
251      v.get().apply(aa);
252      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore())
253         .addBean(Method.class, method())
254         .addBean(MarshallingContext.Builder.class, v.get());
255      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MarshallingContext.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
256         .ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
257      return v.get().build();
258   });
259
260   /** The call logger for this operation (delegated to the parent {@link RestContext}). */
261   private final Memoizer<CallLogger> callLogger = memoizer(() -> restContext().getCallLogger());
262
263   /**
264    * The response-converter array for this operation.
265    *
266    * <p>
267    * Walks the {@code @Rest(converters)} class chain (parent-to-child) followed by the
268    * {@code @RestOp(converters)} method chain (parent-to-child). Op-level
269    * {@code noInherit={"converters"}} cuts off the class-chain contribution. An
270    * {@code @Bean RestConverterList} bean (either as a name-anonymous bean in the bean store
271    * or as a {@code @Bean} method whose {@code methodScope} matches this operation's method
272    * name) REPLACES the entire annotation-derived list.
273    */
274   private final Memoizer<RestConverter[]> converters = memoizer(() -> {
275      var bs = beanStore();
276      var b = RestConverterList.create(bs);
277      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_converters))
278         restContext().getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_converters)
279            .forEach(ai -> b.append(ai.inner().converters()));
280      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_converters)
281         .forEach(ai -> ai.getClassArray("converters", RestConverter.class).ifPresent(classes -> {
282            for (var c : classes)
283               b.append(classArray(c));
284         }));
285      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestConverterList.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope).orElse(null);
286      if (override == null)
287         override = bs.getBean(RestConverterList.class).orElse(null);
288      return (nn(override) ? override : b.build()).asArray();
289   });
290
291   /** The effective {@link DebugConfig} for this operation. */
292   private final Memoizer<DebugConfig> debugConfig = memoizer(() -> restContext().getDebugConfig());
293
294   /** The effective default {@link Charset} for this operation, resolved from op annotations, context, or env. */
295   private final Memoizer<Charset> defaultCharset = memoizer(() -> {
296      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_defaultCharset);
297      if (v.isPresent())
298         return Charset.forName(v.get());
299      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_defaultCharset)) {
300         var rv = restContext().mergeReplacedStringAttribute(PROPERTY_defaultCharset, null);
301         if (ine(rv))
302            return Charset.forName(rv);
303      }
304      return Charset.forName(defaultCharsetName);
305   });
306
307   /**
308    * The default request attribute map for this operation.
309    *
310    * <p>
311    * Starts with the class-level value (which already incorporates
312    * {@code @Rest(defaultRequestAttributes)}), then walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb chain
313    * (parent-to-child) and adds each entry — {@link NamedAttributeMap#add} uses put-semantics so
314    * child entries override parent entries by name. An
315    * {@code @Bean(name="defaultRequestAttributes") NamedAttributeMap} bean (matching this
316    * operation's method scope) REPLACES the entire result.
317    */
318   private final Memoizer<NamedAttributeMap> defaultRequestAttributes = memoizer(() -> {
319      var v = Holder.of(restContext().getDefaultRequestAttributes().copy());
320      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes).forEach(ai -> {
321         for (var s : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
322            v.get().add(BasicNamedAttribute.ofPair(s));
323      });
324      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(NamedAttributeMap.class, resource(), x -> matchesInjectScope(x, PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes))
325         .ifPresent(v::set);
326      return v.get();
327   });
328
329   /**
330    * The default request form-data parts for this operation.
331    *
332    * <p>
333    * Walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb chain (parent-to-child); each {@code defaultRequestFormData}
334    * entry is applied with {@link PartList#setDefault} (first-in-chain wins per name).
335    * Method-parameter {@link FormData @FormData} annotations with a
336    * {@link Schema#default_()}/{@link Schema#df()} default are folded in last (also
337    * {@code setDefault} = first wins). An {@code @Bean(name="defaultRequestFormData") PartList}
338    * bean (matching this operation's method scope) REPLACES the entire result.
339    */
340   private final Memoizer<HttpPartList> defaultRequestFormData = memoizer(() -> {
341      var v = Holder.of(HttpPartList.create());
342      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestFormData).forEach(ai -> {
343         for (var s : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_defaultRequestFormData).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
344            v.get().setDefault(HttpStringPart.ofPair(s));
345      });
346      processParameterDefaults((paramAnn, def) -> {
347         if (paramAnn instanceof FormData f) {
348            try {
349               v.get().setDefault(HttpStringPart.of(firstNonEmpty(f.name(), f.value()), toPartValue(parseIfJson(def))));
350            } catch (ParseException e) {
351               throw new ConfigException(e, "Malformed @FormData annotation");
352            }
353         }
354      });
355      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartList.class, resource(), x -> matchesInjectScope(x, PROPERTY_defaultRequestFormData))
356         .ifPresent(v::set);
357      return v.get();
358   });
359
360   /**
361    * The default request headers for this operation.
362    *
363    * <p>
364    * Starts with the class-level value (which already incorporates
365    * {@code @Rest(defaultRequestHeaders|defaultAccept|defaultContentType)}), then walks the
366    * {@code @RestOp}/verb chain (parent-to-child); each annotation's {@code defaultRequestHeaders}
367    * entries plus its {@code defaultAccept} / {@code defaultContentType} (folded into
368    * {@code Accept} / {@code Content-Type} headers) are applied with {@link HeaderList#setDefault}
369    * (first-in-chain wins per name — class-level beats op-level beats later op-level entries).
370    *
371    * <p>
372    * Method-parameter {@link Header @Header} annotations with a
373    * {@link Schema#default_()}/{@link Schema#df()} default are folded in last via
374    * {@link HeaderList#set} (overrides any prior entry with the same name). An
375    * {@code @Bean(name="defaultRequestHeaders") HeaderList} bean (matching this operation's
376    * method scope) REPLACES the entire result.
377    */
378   private final Memoizer<HttpHeaderList> defaultRequestHeaders = memoizer(() -> {
379      var v = Holder.of(restContext().getDefaultRequestHeaders().copy());
380      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders).forEach(ai -> {
381         for (var s : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
382            v.get().setDefault(HttpStringHeader.ofPair(s));
383         ai.getString(PROPERTY_defaultAccept).filter(s -> !s.isEmpty()).ifPresent(s -> v.get().setDefault(Accept.of(s)));
384         ai.getString(PROPERTY_defaultContentType).filter(s -> !s.isEmpty()).ifPresent(s -> v.get().setDefault(ContentType.of(s)));
385      });
386      processParameterDefaults((paramAnn, def) -> {
387         if (paramAnn instanceof Header h) {
388            try {
389               v.get().set(HttpStringHeader.of(firstNonEmpty(h.name(), h.value()), toPartValue(parseIfJson(def))));
390            } catch (ParseException e) {
391               throw new ConfigException(e, "Malformed @Header annotation");
392            }
393         }
394      });
395      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpHeaderList.class, resource(), x -> matchesInjectScope(x, PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders))
396         .ifPresent(v::set);
397      return v.get();
398   });
399
400   /**
401    * The default request query-data parts for this operation.
402    *
403    * <p>
404    * Walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb chain (parent-to-child); each {@code defaultRequestQueryData}
405    * entry is applied with {@link PartList#setDefault} (first-in-chain wins per name).
406    * Method-parameter {@link Query @Query} annotations with a
407    * {@link Schema#default_()}/{@link Schema#df()} default are folded in last (also
408    * {@code setDefault} = first wins). An {@code @Bean(name="defaultRequestQueryData") PartList}
409    * bean (matching this operation's method scope) REPLACES the entire result.
410    */
411   private final Memoizer<HttpPartList> defaultRequestQueryData = memoizer(() -> {
412      var v = Holder.of(HttpPartList.create());
413      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestQueryData).forEach(ai -> {
414         for (var s : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_defaultRequestQueryData).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
415            v.get().setDefault(HttpStringPart.ofPair(s));
416      });
417      processParameterDefaults((paramAnn, def) -> {
418         if (paramAnn instanceof Query q) {
419            try {
420               v.get().setDefault(HttpStringPart.of(firstNonEmpty(q.name(), q.value()), toPartValue(parseIfJson(def))));
421            } catch (ParseException e) {
422               throw new ConfigException(e, "Malformed @Query annotation");
423            }
424         }
425      });
426      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartList.class, resource(), x -> matchesInjectScope(x, PROPERTY_defaultRequestQueryData))
427         .ifPresent(v::set);
428      return v.get();
429   });
430
431   /**
432    * The default response headers for this operation.
433    *
434    * <p>
435    * Starts with the class-level value (which already incorporates
436    * {@code @Rest(defaultResponseHeaders)}), then walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb chain
437    * (parent-to-child); each annotation's {@code defaultResponseHeaders} entries are applied with
438    * {@link HeaderList#setDefault} (first-in-chain wins per name). An
439    * {@code @Bean(name="defaultResponseHeaders") HeaderList} bean (matching this operation's
440    * method scope) REPLACES the entire result.
441    */
442   private final Memoizer<HttpHeaderList> defaultResponseHeaders = memoizer(() -> {
443      var v = Holder.of(restContext().getDefaultResponseHeaders().copy());
444      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders).forEach(ai -> {
445         for (var s : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders).orElse(EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
446            v.get().setDefault(HttpStringHeader.ofPair(s));
447      });
448      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpHeaderList.class, resource(), x -> matchesInjectScope(x, PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders))
449         .ifPresent(v::set);
450      return v.get();
451   });
452
453   /**
454    * The encoder group for this operation.
455    *
456    * <p>
457    * Walks the {@code @RestOp(encoders)} chain (parent-to-child); each non-empty {@code encoders()}
458    * array REPLACES the inherited set (with {@link Inherit} as a sentinel that re-injects the prior
459    * set's entries at the specified position — matches the legacy {@code EncoderSet.Builder.set(...)}
460    * semantics). Falls through to the class-level {@link RestContext#getEncoders()} when no op
461    * annotation declares encoders. An {@code @Bean EncoderSet} bean (matching this operation's
462    * method scope) REPLACES the result entirely.
463    */
464   private final Memoizer<EncoderSet> encoders = memoizer(() -> {
465      var bs = beanStore();
466      var b = restContext().getEncodersBuilder().copy();
467      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_encoders).forEach(ai -> {
468         var c = ai.getClassArray("encoders", Encoder.class).orElse(null);
469         if (nn(c) && c.length > 0)
470            b.set(c);
471      });
472      var v = Holder.of(b.build());
473      bs.createBeanFromMethod(EncoderSet.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
474         .ifPresent(v::set);
475      return v.get();
476   });
477
478   /**
479    * The request-guard array for this operation. <b>Cross-bucket memoizer</b> — folds three
480    * annotation attributes ({@code guards}, {@code roleGuard}, {@code rolesDeclared}) into a
481    * single effective {@link RestGuardList}.
482    *
483    * <p>
484    * Walk order: class {@code @Rest} chain (parent-to-child, gated by op-level
485    * {@code noInherit={"guards"}}), then op {@code @RestOp} chain (parent-to-child). Concretely:
486    * <ul>
487    *    <li>Each annotation contributes its {@code guards()} classes (appended in chain order).
488    *    <li>Each annotation contributes its {@code rolesDeclared()} CDL into a single role-name set.
489    *    <li>Each annotation contributes its {@code roleGuard()} string (when non-blank). Each
490    *       non-blank {@code roleGuard} becomes a {@link RoleBasedRestGuard} appended to the list,
491    *       using the accumulated {@code rolesDeclared} set as its allow-list.
492    * </ul>
493    *
494    * <p>
495    * An {@code @Bean RestGuardList} bean (via the bean store or an {@code @Bean} method
496    * with matching {@code methodScope}) REPLACES the entire annotation-derived list (Decision #1).
497    */
498   private final Memoizer<RestGuard[]> guards = memoizer(() -> {
499      var bs = beanStore();
500      var b = RestGuardList.create(bs);
501      var rolesDeclaredSet = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
502      var roleGuardStrs = new ArrayList<String>();
503
504      Consumer<AnnotationInfo<?>> walk = ai -> {
505         ai.getClassArray("guards", RestGuard.class).ifPresent(classes -> {
506            for (var c : classes)
507               b.append(classArray(c));
508         });
509         // rolesDeclared is a single CDL string (not an array) on every annotation in the chain.
510         ai.getString("rolesDeclared").filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
511            .ifPresent(s -> resolveCdl(s).forEach(rolesDeclaredSet::add));
512         ai.getString("roleGuard").filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).ifPresent(roleGuardStrs::add);
513      };
514
515      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_guards))
516         restContext().getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_guards).forEach(walk::accept);
517      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_guards).forEach(walk);
518
519      // When no @Rest/@RestOp(rolesDeclared) is set, pass null so RoleBasedRestGuard
520      // infers role names from the expression itself (legacy semantics — an empty
521      // declared-role set would silently never match).
522      var declaredRoles = rolesDeclaredSet.isEmpty() ? null : rolesDeclaredSet;
523      for (var rg : roleGuardStrs) {
524         try {
525            b.append(new RoleBasedRestGuard(declaredRoles, rg));
526         } catch (java.text.ParseException e) {
527            throw toRex(e);
528         }
529      }
530
531      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestGuardList.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope).orElse(null);
532      if (override == null)
533         override = bs.getBean(RestGuardList.class).orElse(null);
534      return (nn(override) ? override : b.build()).asArray();
535   });
536
537   /** The depth of the declaring class in the inheritance chain. */
538   private final Memoizer<Integer> hierarchyDepth = memoizer(() -> {
539      int hierarchyDepthTemp = 0;
540      var sc = method().getDeclaringClass().getSuperclass();
541      while (nn(sc)) {
542         hierarchyDepthTemp++;
543         sc = sc.getSuperclass();
544      }
545      return hierarchyDepthTemp;
546   });
547
548   /**
549    * The HTTP method string for this operation (e.g. {@code "GET"}, {@code "*"}).
550    *
551    * <p>
552    * Walks {@code @RestOp}-group annotations child-to-parent; verb-specific annotations
553    * ({@link RestGet}, etc.) imply their fixed verb. Falls back to
554    * {@link HttpUtils#detectHttpMethod} when no annotation declares a verb.
555    */
556   @SuppressWarnings({
557      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity: annotation-driven HTTP method dispatch benefits from consolidated linear scan.
558   })
559   private final Memoizer<String> httpMethod = memoizer(() -> {
560      var vr = varResolver();
561      for (var ai : getRestOpAnnotations()) {
562         var v = httpMethodFromAnnotation(ai.inner(), vr);
563         if (ine(v))
564            return normalizeHttpMethod(v);
565      }
566      return normalizeHttpMethod(HttpUtils.detectHttpMethod(method(), true, "GET"));
567   });
568
569   /** The JSON-Schema generator for this operation (op-level annotations applied on top of the parent). */
570   private final Memoizer<JsonSchemaGenerator> jsonSchemaGenerator = memoizer(() -> {
571      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
572      var parent = restContext().getJsonSchemaGeneratorBuilder();
573      if (!parent.canApply(aa))
574         return restContext().getJsonSchemaGenerator();
575      Holder<JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder> v = Holder.of(parent.copy());
576      v.get().apply(aa);
577      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore())
578         .addBean(Method.class, method())
579         .addBean(JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.class, v.get());
580      bs.createBeanFromMethod(JsonSchemaGenerator.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
581         .ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
582      return v.get().build();
583   });
584
585   /**
586    * The request-matcher list for this operation. <b>Cross-bucket memoizer</b> — folds
587    * {@code matchers} and {@code clientVersion} (both op-level only) into a single effective
588    * {@link RestMatcherList}.
589    *
590    * <p>
591    * Walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb annotation chain (parent-to-child, gated by op-level
592    * {@code noInherit={"matchers"}}). Each annotation contributes its {@code matchers()} classes
593    * (appended in chain order). The final non-blank {@code clientVersion()} (most-derived wins)
594    * appends a single {@link ClientVersionMatcher} keyed off the resource's client-version header.
595    * An {@code @Bean RestMatcherList} bean (via the bean store or an {@code @Bean}
596    * method with matching {@code methodScope}) REPLACES the entire annotation-derived list.
597    */
598   private final Memoizer<RestMatcherList> matchersList = memoizer(() -> {
599      var bs = beanStore();
600      var b = RestMatcherList.create(bs);
601      var clientVersion = new String[]{null};
602
603      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_matchers).forEach(ai -> {
604         ai.getClassArray("matchers", RestMatcher.class).ifPresent(classes -> {
605            for (var c : classes)
606               b.append(classArray(c));
607         });
608         ai.getString("clientVersion").filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).ifPresent(s -> clientVersion[0] = s);
609      });
610
611      if (nn(clientVersion[0]))
612         b.append(new ClientVersionMatcher(restContext().getClientVersionHeader(), MethodInfo.of(method())));
613
614      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestMatcherList.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope).orElse(null);
615      if (override == null)
616         override = bs.getBean(RestMatcherList.class).orElse(null);
617      return nn(override) ? override : b.build();
618   });
619
620   /** The invoker for the operation method itself. */
621   private final Memoizer<RestOpInvoker> methodInvoker = memoizer(() ->
622      new RestOpInvoker(method(), restContext().findRestOperationArgs(method(), opBeanStore()), restContext().getMethodExecStats(method()), this::resource)
623   );
624
625   /** The effective max-input byte limit for this operation. */
626   private final Memoizer<Long> maxInput = memoizer(() -> {
627      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_maxInput);
628      if (v.isPresent())
629         return parseLongWithSuffix(v.get());
630      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_maxInput)) {
631         var rv = restContext().mergeReplacedStringAttribute(PROPERTY_maxInput, null);
632         if (ine(rv))
633            return parseLongWithSuffix(rv);
634      }
635      return parseLongWithSuffix(defaultMaxInputString);
636   });
637
638   /**
639    * Whether this operation emits RFC 7807 {@code application/problem+json} responses.
640    *
641    * <p>
642    * Tri-state semantics on the {@code @RestOp}-group annotations:
643    * <ul>
644    *    <li>{@code "true"} &mdash; opt this operation in.
645    *    <li>{@code "false"} &mdash; opt this operation out (overrides an opted-in resource).
646    *    <li>{@code ""} (default) &mdash; inherit from the resource-level {@code @Rest(problemDetails)}.
647    * </ul>
648    */
649   private final Memoizer<Boolean> problemDetails = memoizer(() -> {
650      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_problemDetails);
651      if (v.isPresent())
652         return Boolean.parseBoolean(v.get());
653      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_problemDetails))
654         return restContext().isProblemDetails();
655      return false;
656   });
657
658   /**
659    * Whether this operation opts into per-request virtual-thread dispatch on Java 21+.
660    *
661    * <p>
662    * Tri-state semantics on {@code @RestOp}-group annotations: {@code "true"} enables, {@code "false"} disables
663    * (overrides an opted-in resource), and {@code ""} (default) inherits from {@code @Rest(virtualThreads)}. Honored
664    * only when the resource-level {@link RestContext#getVirtualThreadExecutor()} is non-{@code null} (Java 21+).
665    */
666   private final Memoizer<Boolean> virtualThreadsEnabled = memoizer(() -> {
667      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_virtualThreads);
668      if (v.isPresent())
669         return Boolean.parseBoolean(v.get());
670      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_virtualThreads))
671         return restContext().isVirtualThreadsEnabled();
672      return false;
673   });
674
675   /**
676    * Configurable async-response timeout (milliseconds) for this operation; {@code -1} when neither the op
677    * annotation nor the resource declares a value (so {@code AsyncResponseProcessor}'s 30-second default applies).
678    */
679   private final Memoizer<Long> asyncTimeoutMillis = memoizer(() -> {
680      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis);
681      if (v.isPresent()) {
682         try {
683            return Long.parseLong(v.get().trim());
684         } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
685            return -1L;
686         }
687      }
688      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis))
689         return restContext().getAsyncTimeoutMillis();
690      return -1L;
691   });
692
693   /**
694    * Per-op async-completion executor: op-level bean name overrides {@code @Rest}-level, then both are
695    * resolved against the resource's bean store. {@code null} when unset (natural completion thread).
696    */
697   private final Memoizer<Executor> asyncCompletionExecutor = memoizer(() -> {
698      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor);
699      if (v.isPresent()) {
700         var name = v.get();
701         var bs = beanStore();
702         var resolved = bs.getBean(Executor.class, name);
703         if (resolved.isEmpty())
704            resolved = bs.getBean(ExecutorService.class, name).map(e -> (Executor) e);
705         if (resolved.isEmpty())
706            throw new IllegalStateException(
707               "@RestOp(asyncCompletionExecutor) on " + restContext().getResourceClass().getName()
708                  + "#" + method().getName() + " references bean name '" + name + "' but no Executor"
709                  + " (or ExecutorService) bean with that name is registered in the resource's bean store.");
710         return resolved.get();
711      }
712      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor))
713         return restContext().getAsyncCompletionExecutor();
714      return null;
715   });
716
717   /**
718    * Effective per-op observability state, resolving verb / {@code @RestOp} annotation override first,
719    * then falling back to the resource-level {@code @Rest(observability)} attribute.
720    *
721    * <ul class='values'>
722    *    <li>{@code "true"} &mdash; strict opt-in; this operation requires a wired backend.
723    *    <li>{@code "false"} &mdash; explicit opt-out; the observability block is short-circuited.
724    *    <li>{@code null} &mdash; default inherit behavior; a missing backend silently falls back to NoOp.
725    * </ul>
726    */
727   private final Memoizer<String> observabilityAttr = memoizer(() -> {
728      var v = findOpString(PROPERTY_observability);
729      if (v.isPresent())
730         return v.get();
731      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_observability))
732         return restContext().getObservabilityAttribute();
733      return null;
734   });
735
736   /**
737    * Per-op metric name override from {@code @RestOp(metricName)}.
738    * Empty string (default) means the recorder uses its own default name derivation.
739    */
740   private final Memoizer<String> metricName = memoizer(() ->
741      findOpString(PROPERTY_metricName).orElse(""));
742
743   /**
744    * Per-op additional metric tags from {@code @RestOp(metricTags)}.
745    * Format: comma-separated {@code key=value} pairs. Empty string (default) means no additional tags.
746    */
747   private final Memoizer<String> metricTags = memoizer(() ->
748      findOpString(PROPERTY_metricTags).orElse(""));
749
750   /** Aggregated {@code noInherit} keys from all RestOp-group annotations on this operation. */
751   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> noInheritOp = memoizer(() -> {
752      var l = getRestOpAnnotations().stream()
753         .map(ai -> ai.getStringArray("noInherit").orElse(StringUtils.EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
754         .flatMap(this::resolveCdl)
755         .toList();
756      return u(treeSetCi(l));
757   });
758
759   /** The optional (non-required) matchers extracted from {@link #matchersList}. */
760   private final Memoizer<RestMatcher[]> optionalMatchers = memoizer(() -> matchersList.get().getOptionalEntries());
761
762   /** The invokers for context-level post-call lifecycle methods. */
763   private final Memoizer<RestOpInvoker[]> postCallMethods = memoizer(() ->
764      restContext().getPostCallMethods().stream().map(x -> new RestOpInvoker(x, restContext().findRestOperationArgs(x, opBeanStore()), restContext().getMethodExecStats(x), this::resource)).toArray(RestOpInvoker[]::new)
765   );
766
767   /** The invokers for context-level pre-call lifecycle methods. */
768   private final Memoizer<RestOpInvoker[]> preCallMethods = memoizer(() ->
769      restContext().getPreCallMethods().stream().map(x -> new RestOpInvoker(x, restContext().findRestOperationArgs(x, opBeanStore()), restContext().getMethodExecStats(x), this::resource)).toArray(RestOpInvoker[]::new)
770   );
771
772   /**
773    * The parser group for this operation.
774    *
775    * <p>
776    * Walks the {@code @RestOp(parsers)} chain (parent-to-child); the most-derived non-empty
777    * {@code parsers()} array REPLACES the entire inherited set. Falls through to the class-level
778    * {@link RestContext#getParsers()} when no op annotation declares parsers. An
779    * {@code @Bean ParserSet} bean (matching this operation's method scope) REPLACES the result.
780    */
781   private final Memoizer<ParserSet> parsers = memoizer(() -> {
782      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
783      var bs = beanStore();
784      var pb = restContext().getParsersBuilder();
785      var b = pb.copy();
786      if (pb.canApply(aa))
787         b.apply(aa);
788      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_parsers).forEach(ai -> {
789         var c = ai.getClassArray("parsers", Object.class).orElse(null);
790         if (nn(c) && c.length > 0)
791            b.set(c);
792      });
793      var result = Holder.of(b.build());
794      bs.createBeanFromMethod(ParserSet.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
795         .ifPresent(result::set);
796      return result.get();
797   });
798
799   /** The HTTP part parser for this operation (op-level creator applied on top of the parent). */
800   private final Memoizer<HttpPartParser> partParser = memoizer(() -> {
801      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
802      var parent = restContext().getPartParserCreator();
803      if (!parent.canApply(aa))
804         return restContext().getPartParser();
805      Holder<HttpPartParser.Creator> v = Holder.of(parent.copy());
806      v.get().apply(aa);
807      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore())
808         .addBean(Method.class, method())
809         .addBean(HttpPartParser.Creator.class, v.get());
810      bs.createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartParser.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
811         .ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
812      return v.get().create();
813   });
814
815   /** The HTTP part serializer for this operation (op-level creator applied on top of the parent). */
816   private final Memoizer<HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer = memoizer(() -> {
817      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
818      var parent = restContext().getPartSerializerCreator();
819      if (!parent.canApply(aa))
820         return restContext().getPartSerializer();
821      Holder<HttpPartSerializer.Creator> v = Holder.of(parent.copy());
822      v.get().apply(aa);
823      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore())
824         .addBean(Method.class, method())
825         .addBean(HttpPartSerializer.Creator.class, v.get());
826      bs.createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartSerializer.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
827         .ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
828      return v.get().create();
829   });
830
831   /**
832    * The URL path matchers for this operation.
833    *
834    * <p>
835    * Walks the {@code @RestOp}/verb annotation chain (parent-to-child) and collects each
836    * annotation's {@code path[]} array plus its {@code value()} (the conventional shortcut form on
837    * {@link RestGet @RestGet}/{@link RestPost @RestPost}/etc., or the {@code "METHOD path"} pair on
838    * {@link RestOp @RestOp}). When no explicit paths are declared, the operation method name (with
839    * the verb prefix stripped where applicable) is auto-detected via {@link HttpUtils#detectHttpPath}.
840    * For RRPC operations with no explicit path, a trailing {@code "/*"} is appended so the matcher
841    * matches anything below the method's URL.
842    * {@code noInherit={"path"}} cuts off any further parent-chain contribution. A
843    * {@code @Bean UrlPathMatcherList} bean (matching this operation's method scope) REPLACES
844    * the entire result.
845    *
846    * <p>
847    * SVL variables (e.g. {@code $S{key,default}} or the shorthand {@code ${key:default}}) in path
848    * strings are resolved via the host {@link RestContext}'s {@link VarResolver} before being
849    * compiled into {@link UrlPathMatcher} patterns &mdash; this closes the asymmetry with class-level
850    * {@link Rest#path() @Rest(path)} / {@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)}, which are also
851    * SVL-resolved. Strings that contain no SVL markers pass through unchanged, so this is a strict
852    * superset of the previous behavior. Path strings whose entire SVL resolution yields an empty
853    * string are skipped (matching how empty pieces are dropped from the post-comma-split pipeline at
854    * the class level &mdash; see {@code RestContext#splitPathsValue}). Unresolved variables (no
855    * registered {@link Var}) pass through to {@link UrlPathMatcher#of} as the literal {@code ${...}}
856    * placeholder, which then fails predictably at routing time. The auto-detected fallback path
857    * (derived from the method name via {@link HttpUtils#detectHttpPath}) is intentionally
858    * <i>not</i> SVL-resolved &mdash; it is framework-derived, not user input.
859    */
860   @SuppressWarnings({
861      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity: annotation-driven path-matcher construction benefits from consolidated linear scan.
862   })
863   private final Memoizer<UrlPathMatcher[]> pathMatchers = memoizer(() -> {
864      var v = Holder.of(UrlPathMatcherList.create());
865      var vr = varResolver();
866      // Use a single VarResolverSession + explicit compile(...) / .resolve(session) per path
867      // so the framework hot path exercises the compiled-template seam explicitly.
868      // Each distinct path string is tokenized once into a VarTemplate, then resolved against
869      // this session. If we ever switch to per-request dynamic path resolution, the seam is
870      // already in place — only the .resolve(session) call moves to the request handler.
871      var session = vr.createSession();
872      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_path).forEach(ai -> {
873         for (var p : ai.getStringArray(PROPERTY_path).orElse(StringUtils.EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY)) {
874            var resolved = vr.compile(p).resolve(session);
875            if (!resolved.isEmpty())
876               v.get().add(UrlPathMatcher.of(resolved));
877         }
878         // On verb annotations (@RestGet/@RestPost/etc.) value() is always the path. On @RestOp,
879         // value() is "[METHOD] [path]" where the leading method token is optional — only when a
880         // space is present does the trailing token represent a path. To keep this loop annotation-
881         // agnostic, we apply the @RestOp space-split rule only when an @RestOp annotation is in
882         // play (i.e. the annotation type matches), and otherwise treat value() as a plain path.
883         // SVL is applied AFTER the space-split rule so a resolved path can never be misinterpreted
884         // as a "METHOD path" pair (the method token is structural, not user-overridable via SVL).
885         ai.getString(PROPERTY_value).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).map(String::trim).ifPresent(s -> {
886            if (ai.inner() instanceof RestOp) {
887               var i = s.indexOf(' ');
888               if (i != -1) {
889                  var resolved = vr.compile(s.substring(i).trim()).resolve(session);
890                  if (!resolved.isEmpty())
891                     v.get().add(UrlPathMatcher.of(resolved));
892               }
893            } else {
894               var resolved = vr.compile(s).resolve(session);
895               if (!resolved.isEmpty())
896                  v.get().add(UrlPathMatcher.of(resolved));
897            }
898         });
899      });
900
901      if (v.get().isEmpty()) {
902         var methodInfo2 = MethodInfo.of(method());
903         String httpMethod2 = null;
904         if (methodInfo2.hasAnnotation(RestGet.class))
905            httpMethod2 = "get";
906         else if (methodInfo2.hasAnnotation(RestPut.class))
907            httpMethod2 = "put";
908         else if (methodInfo2.hasAnnotation(RestPost.class))
909            httpMethod2 = "post";
910         else if (methodInfo2.hasAnnotation(RestDelete.class))
911            httpMethod2 = "delete";
912         else if (methodInfo2.hasAnnotation(RestOp.class)) {
913            // @formatter:off
914            httpMethod2 = AP.find(RestOp.class, methodInfo2)
915               .stream()
916               .map(x -> x.inner().method())
917               .filter(Shorts::ine)
918               .findFirst()
919               .orElse(null);
920            // @formatter:on
921         }
922
923         var p = HttpUtils.detectHttpPath(method(), httpMethod2);
924
925         // RRPC operations match anything below the method's URL when no explicit path is supplied
926         if ("RRPC".equalsIgnoreCase(httpMethod2) && ! p.endsWith("/*"))
927            p += "/*";
928
929         v.get().add(UrlPathMatcher.of(p));
930      }
931
932      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(UrlPathMatcherList.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope, v.get())
933         .ifPresent(v::set);
934
935      // @Mixin(path/paths) re-mount: when this op belongs to a mixin sub-context whose host @Mixin declared a
936      // mount prefix, re-mount every matcher under each host-chosen prefix.  Reuses the pathToken normalization
937      // (via RestContext.getMixinMountPrefixes) so override input forms (bare / leading-slash / trailing /*)
938      // all collapse to one clean prefix.  Build-time only.
939      var prefixes = restContext().getMixinMountPrefixes();
940      if (! prefixes.isEmpty()) {
941         var remounted = UrlPathMatcherList.create();
942         for (var prefix : prefixes)
943            for (var pm : v.get().asArray())
944               remounted.add(UrlPathMatcher.of(prefixPath(prefix, pm.toString())));
945         v.set(remounted);
946      }
947
948      return v.get().asArray();
949   });
950
951   /**
952    * Prepends a host-chosen mixin mount prefix to an op path pattern.
953    *
954    * <p>
955    * {@code prefix} is a bare token (no slashes — already normalized by {@code RestContext.getMixinMountPrefixes}).
956    * The original pattern keeps its leading slash and any trailing {@code /*}; e.g. prefix {@code "admin"} +
957    * pattern {@code /info} &rarr; {@code /admin/info}, and prefix {@code "admin"} + {@code /loggers/*} &rarr;
958    * {@code /admin/loggers/*}.
959    *
960    * @param prefix The normalized mount-prefix token.
961    * @param pattern The original op path pattern.
962    * @return The prefixed pattern.
963    */
964   private static String prefixPath(String prefix, String pattern) {
965      var p = pattern.startsWith("/") ? pattern : "/" + pattern;
966      return "/" + prefix + p;
967   }
968
969   /** The required matchers extracted from {@link #matchersList}. */
970   private final Memoizer<RestMatcher[]> requiredMatchers = memoizer(() -> matchersList.get().getRequiredEntries());
971
972   /** The computed response metadata for this operation method. */
973   private final Memoizer<ResponseBeanMeta> responseMeta = memoizer(() -> ResponseBeanMeta.create(methodInfo(), appliedAnnotations()));
974
975   /**
976    * All {@link RestOp}-group annotations on this method, in child-to-parent order.
977    *
978    * <p>
979    * Uses the same {@link MethodInfo} as the annotation traversal in the {@link Builder}, so
980    * method-level metadata (e.g. {@code noInherit}) resolves consistently when the implementation
981    * class differs from the method's declaring class.
982    */
983   private final Memoizer<List<AnnotationInfo<?>>> restOpAnnotations = memoizer(() -> {
984      var methodInfo = MethodInfo.of(restContext().getResourceClass(), method()).accessible();
985      return restContext().getAnnotationProvider().find(methodInfo, SELF, MATCHING_METHODS).stream()
986         .filter(ai -> ai.isInGroup(RestOp.class))
987         .toList();
988   });
989
990   /**
991    * The serializer group for this operation.
992    *
993    * <p>
994    * Walks the {@code @RestOp(serializers)} chain (parent-to-child); the most-derived non-empty
995    * {@code serializers()} array REPLACES the entire inherited set. Falls through to the class-level
996    * {@link RestContext#getSerializers()} when no op annotation declares serializers. An
997    * {@code @Bean SerializerSet} bean (matching this operation's method scope) REPLACES the result.
998    */
999   private final Memoizer<SerializerSet> serializers = memoizer(() -> {
1000      var aa = appliedAnnotations();
1001      var bs = beanStore();
1002      var sb = restContext().getSerializersBuilder();
1003      var b = sb.copy();
1004      if (sb.canApply(aa))
1005         b.apply(aa);
1006      getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_serializers).forEach(ai -> {
1007         var c = ai.getClassArray("serializers", Serializer.class).orElse(null);
1008         if (nn(c) && c.length > 0)
1009            b.set(c);
1010      });
1011      var result = Holder.of(b.build());
1012      bs.createBeanFromMethod(SerializerSet.class, resource(), this::matchesInjectScope)
1013         .ifPresent(result::set);
1014      return result.get();
1015   });
1016
1017   /**
1018    * The supported response accept types for this operation.
1019    *
1020    * <p>
1021    * Walks op-level {@code @RestOp}-group annotations for {@code produces} (and, when
1022    * {@code noInherit} does not block it, the class-level {@code @Rest(produces)} hierarchy).
1023    * Falls back to the supported media types of the operation's {@link SerializerSet}.
1024    */
1025   private final Memoizer<List<MediaType>> supportedAcceptTypes = memoizer(() -> {
1026      var result = collectAnnotationMediaTypes(PROPERTY_produces);
1027      if (result.isEmpty())
1028         return u(getSerializers().getSupportedMediaTypes());
1029      return u(result);
1030   });
1031
1032   /**
1033    * The supported request content types for this operation.
1034    *
1035    * <p>
1036    * Walks op-level {@code @RestOp}-group annotations for {@code consumes} (and, when
1037    * {@code noInherit} does not block it, the class-level {@code @Rest(consumes)} hierarchy).
1038    * Falls back to the supported content types of the operation's {@link ParserSet}.
1039    */
1040   private final Memoizer<List<MediaType>> supportedContentTypes = memoizer(() -> {
1041      var result = collectAnnotationMediaTypes(PROPERTY_consumes);
1042      if (result.isEmpty())
1043         return u(getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes());
1044      return u(result);
1045   });
1046
1047   /**
1048    * Iterates over each parameter annotation on the operation method, computing the parameter's
1049    * {@link Schema#default_()}/{@link Schema#df()} string (joined-non-blank-first) and dispatching
1050    * each annotation+default pair to the supplied callback.
1051    */
1052   private void processParameterDefaults(BiConsumer<Annotation,String> callback) {
1053      for (var aa : method.getParameterAnnotations()) {
1054         String def = null;
1055         for (var a : aa) {
1056            if (a instanceof Schema s)
1057               def = joinnlFirstNonEmptyArray(s.default_(), s.df());
1058         }
1059         if (def == null)
1060            continue;
1061         for (var a : aa)
1062            callback.accept(a, def);
1063      }
1064   }
1065
1066   /**
1067    * Returns {@code true} if the given method has a {@code @Bean} annotation whose
1068    * {@code methodScope} includes this operation's method name (or {@code "*"}).
1069    *
1070    * <p>
1071    * Used by op-level memoizers when scanning the resource class for {@code @Bean}-supplied
1072    * composite-bean overrides ({@code RestConverterList}, {@code RestGuardList}, etc.). This is the
1073    * {@link RestOpContext}-scope peer of {@link Builder#matches(MethodInfo)} — kept in sync with that
1074    * one.
1075    */
1076   private boolean matchesInjectScope(MethodInfo annotated) {
1077      var a = annotated.getAnnotations(Bean.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
1078      if (a != null) {
1079         for (var n : a.methodScope()) {
1080            if ("*".equals(n) || method.getName().equals(n))
1081               return true;
1082         }
1083      }
1084      return false;
1085   }
1086
1087   /**
1088    * Same as {@link #matchesInjectScope(MethodInfo)} but additionally requires the
1089    * {@link Bean#name()} attribute to equal {@code beanName}.
1090    *
1091    * <p>
1092    * Used for named composite-bean overrides ({@code defaultRequestHeaders}, {@code defaultResponseHeaders},
1093    * etc.) where the bean type alone is ambiguous (e.g. {@link HeaderList} appears as both request and
1094    * response headers).
1095    */
1096   private boolean matchesInjectScope(MethodInfo annotated, String beanName) {
1097      var a = annotated.getAnnotations(Bean.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
1098      if (a != null) {
1099         if (! a.name().equals(beanName))
1100            return false;
1101         for (var n : a.methodScope()) {
1102            if ("*".equals(n) || method.getName().equals(n))
1103               return true;
1104         }
1105      }
1106      return false;
1107   }
1108
1109   private Stream<String> resolveCdl(String...values) {
1110      if (values == null || values.length == 0)
1111         return Stream.empty();
1112      return Arrays.stream(values)
1113         .filter(Objects::nonNull)
1114         .map(s -> RestOpContext.this.context.getVarResolver().resolve(s))
1115         .map(StringUtils::split)
1116         .flatMap(Collection::stream)
1117         .map(String::trim)
1118         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank);
1119   }
1120
1121   /**
1122    * Returns all {@link RestOp}-group annotations on this operation method, in child-to-parent order.
1123    *
1124    * @return An unmodifiable list, never {@code null}.
1125    */
1126   public List<AnnotationInfo<?>> getRestOpAnnotations() {
1127      return restOpAnnotations.get();
1128   }
1129
1130   /**
1131    * Returns the {@link RestOp}-group annotations on this method for the specified property,
1132    * in <b>parent-to-child</b> order, with op-level {@code noInherit} cutoff applied.
1133    *
1134    * <p>
1135    * Mirrors {@link RestContext#getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} but for the op-level chain. Used by
1136    * op-level memoizers ({@link #converters}, {@link #guards}, {@link #matchersList},
1137    * {@link #encoders}, etc.) when accumulating values from each {@code @RestOp} / {@code @RestGet} /
1138    * {@code @RestPut} / {@code @RestPost} / {@code @RestDelete} / {@code @RestPatch} / {@code @RestOptions}
1139    * annotation in the method-override chain.
1140    *
1141    * @param name The annotation property name (e.g. {@code "converters"}, {@code "guards"}).
1142    * @return A stream of {@link AnnotationInfo} entries in parent-to-child order, never {@code null}.
1143    */
1144   Stream<AnnotationInfo<?>> getRestOpAnnotationsForProperty(String name) {
1145      var annotations = getRestOpAnnotations();
1146      var cutoff = annotations.size();
1147      for (var i = 0; i < annotations.size(); i++) {
1148         if (resolveCdl(annotations.get(i).getStringArray(PROPERTY_noInherit).orElse(StringUtils.EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY)).anyMatch(name::equalsIgnoreCase)) {
1149            cutoff = i + 1;
1150            break;
1151         }
1152      }
1153      return rstream(annotations.subList(0, cutoff));
1154   }
1155
1156   /**
1157    * Returns {@code true} if context-level values for the given property should be merged.
1158    *
1159    * @param property The annotation attribute name (e.g. {@link RestServerConstants#PROPERTY_allowedParserOptions},
1160    *    {@link RestServerConstants#PROPERTY_defaultCharset}, {@link RestServerConstants#PROPERTY_maxInput},
1161    *    {@link RestServerConstants#PROPERTY_debug}).
1162    * @return {@code true} if {@code noInherit} does not contain this property.
1163    */
1164   protected boolean isInherited(String property) {
1165      return !noInheritOp.get().contains(property);
1166   }
1167
1168   /**
1169    * Returns the parser session-option keys allowed for this operation.
1170    *
1171    * @return An unmodifiable case-insensitive sorted set, never {@code null}.
1172    */
1173   public SortedSet<String> getAllowedParserOptions() {
1174      return allowedParserOptions.get();
1175   }
1176
1177   /**
1178    * Returns the serializer session-option keys allowed for this operation.
1179    *
1180    * @return An unmodifiable case-insensitive sorted set, never {@code null}.
1181    */
1182   public SortedSet<String> getAllowedSerializerOptions() {
1183      return allowedSerializerOptions.get();
1184   }
1185
1186   /**
1187    * Startup-fail: validates that when the effective observability attribute for this op is {@code "true"},
1188    * at least one real backend ({@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.MetricsRecorder} or
1189    * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.TracerHook}) is registered.
1190    *
1191    * <p>
1192    * Called once during construction.  The resource-level check in {@link RestContext#checkObservabilityBackendPresent()}
1193    * already fires for {@code @Rest(observability="true")}; this companion fires for individual
1194    * {@code @RestOp(observability="true")} overrides that elevate a single op into strict mode.
1195    */
1196   private void checkOpObservabilityBackendPresent() {
1197      var attr = observabilityAttr.get();
1198      if (!"true".equalsIgnoreCase(attr))
1199         return;
1200      var bs = beanStore();
1201      var recorder = bs.getBean(org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.MetricsRecorder.class).orElse(null);
1202      var tracer = bs.getBean(org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.TracerHook.class).orElse(null);
1203      boolean hasRecorder = recorder != null && !(recorder instanceof org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.NoOpMetricsRecorder);
1204      boolean hasTracer = tracer != null && !(tracer instanceof org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.NoOpTracerHook);
1205      if (!hasRecorder && !hasTracer)
1206         throw new InternalServerError(
1207            "@RestOp(observability=\"true\") is set on " + context.getResourceClass().getSimpleName() + "." + method.getName()
1208            + " but no MetricsRecorder or TracerHook @Bean is registered. "
1209            + "Either wire a backend or change observability to \"\" (inherit) or \"false\" (opt-out).");
1210   }
1211
1212   /**
1213    * Returns the first non-blank, SVL-resolved value of the given attribute across all
1214    * {@code @RestOp}-group annotations on this method (child-to-parent order).
1215    *
1216    * @param attr The annotation attribute name (e.g. {@code "defaultCharset"}).
1217    * @return The resolved string, or empty if no annotation defines it.
1218    */
1219   private Optional<String> findOpString(String attr) {
1220      var vr = varResolver();
1221      for (var ai : getRestOpAnnotations()) {
1222         var s = ai.getString(attr).orElse("");
1223         if (!s.isEmpty()) {
1224            var resolved = vr.resolve(s);
1225            if (!resolved.isEmpty())
1226               return o(resolved);
1227         }
1228      }
1229      return oe();
1230   }
1231
1232   private List<MediaType> collectAnnotationMediaTypes(String attr) {
1233      var result = new ArrayList<MediaType>();
1234      var vr = varResolver();
1235      // Class-level @Rest(consumes|produces) first (when inheritance is allowed), then op-level overrides append.
1236      if (isInherited(attr)) {
1237         for (var ai : restContext().getRestAnnotations())
1238            appendResolvedMediaTypes(ai, attr, vr, result);
1239      }
1240      for (var ai : getRestOpAnnotations())
1241         appendResolvedMediaTypes(ai, attr, vr, result);
1242      return result;
1243   }
1244
1245   private static void appendResolvedMediaTypes(AnnotationInfo<?> ai, String attr, VarResolver vr, List<MediaType> result) {
1246      var arr = ai.getStringArray(attr).orElse(null);
1247      if (arr == null)
1248         return;
1249      for (var s : arr) {
1250         if (isNotEmpty(s)) {
1251            var resolved = vr.resolve(s);
1252            if (!resolved.isEmpty())
1253               result.add(MediaType.of(resolved));
1254         }
1255      }
1256   }
1257
1258   @SuppressWarnings({
1259      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity: reflective annotation dispatch is intentionally consolidated for JIT inlining.
1260   })
1261   private static String httpMethodFromAnnotation(Annotation a, VarResolver vr) {
1262      if (a instanceof RestGet)
1263         return "get";
1264      if (a instanceof RestPut)
1265         return "put";
1266      if (a instanceof RestPost)
1267         return "post";
1268      if (a instanceof RestDelete)
1269         return "delete";
1270      if (a instanceof RestPatch)
1271         return "patch";
1272      if (a instanceof RestOptions)
1273         return "options";
1274      if (a instanceof RestOp r) {
1275         var m = vr.resolve(r.method());
1276         if (ine(m))
1277            return m;
1278         var s = vr.resolve(r.value());
1279         if (s != null) {
1280            s = s.trim();
1281            if (!s.isEmpty()) {
1282               var i = s.indexOf(' ');
1283               return i == -1 ? s : s.substring(0, i).trim();
1284            }
1285         }
1286      }
1287      return null;
1288   }
1289
1290   private static String normalizeHttpMethod(String v) {
1291      if ("METHOD".equalsIgnoreCase(v))
1292         return "*";
1293      return v.toUpperCase(Locale.ENGLISH);
1294   }
1295
1296   /**
1297    * 2-arg positional context constructor.
1298    *
1299    * <p>
1300    * All operation-level configuration is resolved from {@link RestOp}-group annotations on the method and
1301    * inherited from the parent {@link RestContext}.
1302    *
1303    * @param method The Java method this context represents. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1304    * @param context The owning {@link RestContext}. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1305    * @throws ServletException If context could not be created.
1306    * @since 9.2.1
1307    */
1308   public RestOpContext(java.lang.reflect.Method method, RestContext context) throws ServletException {
1309      this(new Builder(method, context));
1310   }
1311
1312   /**
1313    * 3-arg positional context constructor.
1314    *
1315    * @param method The Java method this context represents. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1316    * @param context The owning {@link RestContext}. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1317    * @param resourceSupplier Supplier that returns the invocation target for this operation.
1318    * @throws ServletException If context could not be created.
1319    */
1320   public RestOpContext(java.lang.reflect.Method method, RestContext context, Supplier<Object> resourceSupplier) throws ServletException {
1321      this(new Builder(method, context, resourceSupplier));
1322   }
1323
1324   /**
1325    * Context constructor.
1326    *
1327    * @param builder The builder for this object.
1328    * @throws ServletException If context could not be created.
1329    */
1330   private RestOpContext(Builder builder) throws ServletException {
1331      super(builder);
1332
1333      try {
1334         // Capture the annotation work-list before the builder becomes eligible for GC.
1335         appliedAnnotations = builder.getApplied();
1336
1337         context = builder.restContext;
1338         method = builder.restMethod;
1339         resourceSupplier = builder.restResourceSupplier;
1340
1341         mi = MethodInfo.of(method).accessible();
1342
1343         var bs = new BasicBeanStore(context.getBootstrapBeanStore());
1344         bs.addBean(RestOpContext.class, this);
1345         bs.addBean(Method.class, method);
1346         bs.addBean(AnnotationWorkList.class, appliedAnnotations);
1347         opBeanStore = bs;
1348
1349         bs.add(MarshallingContext.class, getMarshallingContext());
1350         bs.add(RestConverter[].class, getConverters());
1351         bs.add(EncoderSet.class, getEncoders());
1352         bs.add(RestGuard[].class, getGuards());
1353         bs.add(JsonSchemaGenerator.class, getJsonSchemaGenerator());
1354         bs.add(ParserSet.class, getParsers());
1355         bs.add(HttpPartParser.class, getPartParser());
1356         bs.add(HttpPartSerializer.class, getPartSerializer());
1357         bs.add(SerializerSet.class, getSerializers());
1358
1359      // Inject @Value-annotated env-driven defaults onto this RestOpContext instance so that the
1360      // memoizer lambdas (defaultCharset, maxInput) read fully resolved values when first invoked.
1361      ClassInfo.of(this).inject(this, bs);
1362
1363      // Startup-fail check: if this op (or its resource) declares observability="true" but neither
1364      // MetricsRecorder nor TracerHook is wired, fail fast with a precise error.
1365      checkOpObservabilityBackendPresent();
1366
1367      // The 6 formerly-eager scalar fields are now memoized; no eagerness needed here.
1368      // Pre-warm httpMethod so it is in the memoizer cache for immediate use by compareTo/match.
1369      httpMethod.get();
1370
1371         var pm = getPathMatchers();
1372         bs.add(UrlPathMatcher[].class, pm);
1373         bs.addBean(UrlPathMatcher.class, pm.length > 0 ? pm[0] : null);
1374
1375      } catch (Exception e) {
1376         throw new ServletException(e);
1377      }
1378   }
1379
1380   /*
1381    * compareTo() method is used to keep SimpleMethods ordered in the RestCallRouter list.
1382    * It maintains the order in which matches are made during requests.
1383    */
1384   @Override /* Overridden from Comparable */
1385   public int compareTo(RestOpContext o) {
1386      int c;
1387
1388      var pm = getPathMatchers();
1389      var opm = o.getPathMatchers();
1390      for (int i = 0; i < Math.min(pm.length, opm.length); i++) {
1391         c = pm[i].compareTo(opm[i]);
1392         if (c != 0)
1393            return c;
1394      }
1395
1396      c = cmp(o.hierarchyDepth.get(), hierarchyDepth.get());
1397      if (c != 0)
1398         return c;
1399
1400      c = cmp(o.getRequiredMatchers().length, getRequiredMatchers().length);
1401      if (c != 0)
1402         return c;
1403
1404      c = cmp(o.getOptionalMatchers().length, getOptionalMatchers().length);
1405      if (c != 0)
1406         return c;
1407
1408      c = cmp(o.getGuards().length, getGuards().length);
1409
1410      if (c != 0)
1411         return c;
1412
1413      c = cmp(method.getName(), o.method.getName());
1414      if (c != 0)
1415         return c;
1416
1417      c = cmp(method.getParameterCount(), o.method.getParameterCount());
1418      if (c != 0)
1419         return c;
1420
1421      for (var i = 0; i < method.getParameterCount(); i++) {
1422         c = cmp(method.getParameterTypes()[i].getName(), o.method.getParameterTypes()[i].getName());
1423         if (c != 0)
1424            return c;
1425      }
1426
1427      c = cmp(method.getReturnType().getName(), o.method.getReturnType().getName());
1428      if (c != 0)
1429         return c;
1430
1431      return 0;
1432   }
1433
1434   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1435   public Context.Builder copy() {
1436      throw uoex();
1437   }
1438
1439   /**
1440    * Creates a {@link RestRequest} object based on the specified incoming {@link HttpServletRequest} object.
1441    *
1442    * @param session The current REST call.
1443    * @return The wrapped request object.
1444    * @throws Exception If any errors occur trying to interpret the request.
1445    */
1446   public RestRequest createRequest(RestSession session) throws Exception {
1447      return new RestRequest(this, session);
1448   }
1449
1450   /**
1451    * Creates a {@link RestResponse} object based on the specified incoming {@link HttpServletResponse} object
1452    * and the request returned by {@link #createRequest(RestSession)}.
1453    *
1454    * @param session The current REST call.
1455    * @param req The REST request.
1456    * @return The wrapped response object.
1457    * @throws Exception If any errors occur trying to interpret the request or response.
1458    */
1459   public RestResponse createResponse(RestSession session, RestRequest req) throws Exception {
1460      return new RestResponse(this, session, req);
1461   }
1462
1463   /**
1464    * Creates a new REST operation session.
1465    *
1466    * @param session The REST session.
1467    * @return A new REST operation session.
1468    * @throws Exception If op session could not be created.
1469    */
1470   public RestOpSession.Builder createSession(RestSession session) throws Exception {
1471      return RestOpSession.create(this, session).logger(getCallLogger()).debug(debugConfig.get().resolve(this, session.getRequest()).enabled());
1472   }
1473
1474   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1475   public boolean equals(Object o) {
1476      return (o instanceof RestOpContext o2) && eq(this, o2, (x, y) -> eq(x.method, y.method));
1477   }
1478
1479   /**
1480    * Returns the bean context associated with this context.
1481    *
1482    * @return The bean context associated with this context.
1483    */
1484   public MarshallingContext getMarshallingContext() { return marshallingContext.get(); }
1485
1486   /**
1487    * Returns the default charset.
1488    *
1489    * @return The default charset.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1490    */
1491   public Charset getDefaultCharset() { return defaultCharset.get(); }
1492
1493   /**
1494    * Returns the default request attributes.
1495    *
1496    * @return The default request attributes.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1497    */
1498   public NamedAttributeMap getDefaultRequestAttributes() { return defaultRequestAttributes.get(); }
1499
1500   /**
1501    * Returns the default form data parameters.
1502    *
1503    * @return The default form data parameters.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1504    */
1505   public HttpPartList getDefaultRequestFormData() { return defaultRequestFormData.get(); }
1506
1507   /**
1508    * Returns the default request headers.
1509    *
1510    * @return The default request headers.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1511    */
1512   public HttpHeaderList getDefaultRequestHeaders() { return defaultRequestHeaders.get(); }
1513
1514   /**
1515    * Returns the default request query parameters.
1516    *
1517    * @return The default request query parameters.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1518    */
1519   public HttpPartList getDefaultRequestQueryData() { return defaultRequestQueryData.get(); }
1520
1521   /**
1522    * Returns the default response headers.
1523    *
1524    * @return The default response headers.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1525    */
1526   public HttpHeaderList getDefaultResponseHeaders() { return defaultResponseHeaders.get(); }
1527
1528   /**
1529    * Returns the compression encoders to use for this method.
1530    *
1531    * @return The compression encoders to use for this method.
1532    */
1533   public EncoderSet getEncoders() { return encoders.get(); }
1534
1535   /**
1536    * Returns the HTTP method name (e.g. <js>"GET"</js>).
1537    *
1538    * @return The HTTP method name.
1539    */
1540   public String getHttpMethod() { return httpMethod.get(); }
1541
1542   /**
1543    * Returns the underlying Java method that this context belongs to.
1544    *
1545    * @return The underlying Java method that this context belongs to.
1546    */
1547   public Method getJavaMethod() { return method; }
1548
1549   /**
1550    * Returns the JSON-Schema generator applicable to this Java method.
1551    *
1552    * @return The JSON-Schema generator applicable to this Java method.
1553    */
1554   public JsonSchemaGenerator getJsonSchemaGenerator() { return jsonSchemaGenerator.get(); }
1555
1556   /**
1557    * Returns the max number of bytes to process in the input content.
1558    *
1559    * @return The max number of bytes to process in the input content.
1560    */
1561   public long getMaxInput() { return maxInput.get(); }
1562
1563   /**
1564    * Returns whether this operation emits RFC 7807 {@code application/problem+json} responses.
1565    *
1566    * <p>
1567    * Tri-state inheritance semantics: an explicit {@code "true"} or {@code "false"} on the operation annotation
1568    * wins; otherwise the value is inherited from {@link RestContext#isProblemDetails()} (resource-level
1569    * {@code @Rest(problemDetails)}).
1570    *
1571    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
1572    *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest#problemDetails()}
1573    *    <li class='ja'>{@link RestOp#problemDetails()}
1574    * </ul>
1575    *
1576    * @return <jk>true</jk> if RFC 7807 problem-details responses are enabled on this operation.
1577    */
1578   public boolean isProblemDetails() { return problemDetails.get(); }
1579
1580   /**
1581    * Returns whether this operation opts into per-request virtual-thread dispatch on Java 21+.
1582    *
1583    * <p>
1584    * The op-level {@code @RestOp(virtualThreads)} value (when non-blank) wins; otherwise the value is inherited
1585    * from {@link RestContext#isVirtualThreadsEnabled()} (resource-level {@code @Rest(virtualThreads)}). Honored
1586    * only when the resource-level {@link RestContext#getVirtualThreadExecutor()} is non-{@code null} (Java 21+).
1587    *
1588    * @return <jk>true</jk> if virtual-thread dispatch is configured on this operation.
1589    */
1590   public boolean isVirtualThreadsEnabled() { return virtualThreadsEnabled.get(); }
1591
1592   /**
1593    * Returns whether the observability block is enabled for this operation.
1594    *
1595    * <p>
1596    * Returns {@code false} when the effective resolved attribute is {@code "false"} (explicit opt-out).
1597    * Returns {@code true} in all other cases ({@code "true"} strict opt-in or empty/null default).
1598    *
1599    * <p>
1600    * Note: the default behavior (empty/null attribute) still runs the observability block, but silently
1601    * falls back to {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.NoOpMetricsRecorder} when no backend is wired.
1602    * Only {@code "false"} completely short-circuits the block.
1603    *
1604    * @return <jk>false</jk> when this operation has explicitly opted out of observability.
1605    * @see RestOp#observability()
1606    * @see Rest#observability()
1607    */
1608   public boolean isObservabilityEnabled() {
1609      var v = observabilityAttr.get();
1610      return !"false".equalsIgnoreCase(v);
1611   }
1612
1613   /**
1614    * Returns the per-op metric name override from {@code @RestOp(metricName)}.
1615    *
1616    * @return The metric name override, or an empty string when not set.
1617    * @see RestOp#metricName()
1618    */
1619   public String getMetricName() { return metricName.get(); }
1620
1621   /**
1622    * Returns the per-op additional metric tags from {@code @RestOp(metricTags)}.
1623    *
1624    * @return The tags string (comma-separated {@code key=value} pairs), or empty string when not set.
1625    * @see RestOp#metricTags()
1626    */
1627   public String getMetricTags() { return metricTags.get(); }
1628
1629   /**
1630    * Returns the configured async-response timeout (milliseconds) for this operation, or {@code -1} when no
1631    * value was supplied at the op or resource level — in which case the default 30-second fallback applies in
1632    * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.AsyncResponseProcessor}.
1633    *
1634    * @return The async timeout in milliseconds, or {@code -1} when unset.
1635    */
1636   public long getAsyncTimeoutMillis() { return asyncTimeoutMillis.get(); }
1637
1638   /**
1639    * Returns the effective {@link Executor} for routing
1640    * {@link CompletableFuture} completion callbacks on this operation, or
1641    * {@code null} when neither the op nor the resource configures an executor (natural completion thread).
1642    *
1643    * @return The executor, or {@code null} if no async-completion executor is configured.
1644    * @since 10.0.0
1645    */
1646   public Executor getAsyncCompletionExecutor() { return asyncCompletionExecutor.get(); }
1647

1653   public ParserSet getParsers() { return parsers.get(); }

1667   public HttpPartSerializer getPartSerializer() { return partSerializer.get(); }

1674   public String getPathPattern() { return getPathMatchers()[0].toString(); }

1680    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
1681    */
1682   public UrlPathMatcher[] getPathMatchers() { return pathMatchers.get(); }

1698   public RestMatcher[] getRequiredMatchers() { return requiredMatchers.get(); }
