1715   /**
1716    * Returns metadata about the specified response object if it's annotated with {@link Response @Response}.
1717    *
1718    * @param o The response POJO.
1719    * @return Metadata about the specified response object, or <jk>null</jk> if it's not annotated with {@link Response @Response}.
1720    */
1721   public ResponseBeanMeta getResponseBeanMeta(Object o) {
1722      if (o == null)
1723         return null;
1724      var c = o.getClass();
1725      var rbm = responseBeanMetas.get(c);
1726      if (rbm == null) {
1727         rbm = ResponseBeanMeta.create(c, AnnotationWorkList.create());
1728         if (rbm == null)
1729            rbm = ResponseBeanMeta.NULL;
1730         responseBeanMetas.put(c, rbm);
1731      }
1732      if (rbm == ResponseBeanMeta.NULL)
1733         return null;
1734      return rbm;
1735   }
1736
1737   /**
1738    * Returns metadata about the specified response object if it's annotated with {@link Header @Header}.
1739    *
1740    * @param o The response POJO.
1741    * @return Metadata about the specified response object, or <jk>null</jk> if it's not annotated with {@link Header @Header}.
1742    */
1743   public ResponsePartMeta getResponseHeaderMeta(Object o) {
1744      if (o == null)
1745         return null;
1746      var c = o.getClass();
1747      var pm = headerPartMetas.get(c);
1748      if (pm == null) {
1749         var a = ClassInfo.of(c).getAnnotations(Header.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
1750         if (nn(a)) {
1751            var schema = HttpPartSchema.create(a);
1752         @SuppressWarnings({
1753            "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type parameter is verified by caller context.
1754         })
1755         var serializer = createPartSerializer((Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer>)schema.getSerializer(), getPartSerializer());
1756            pm = new ResponsePartMeta(HEADER, schema, serializer);
1757         }
1758         if (pm == null)
1759            pm = ResponsePartMeta.NULL;
1760         headerPartMetas.put(c, pm);
1761      }
1762      if (pm == ResponsePartMeta.NULL)
1763         return null;
1764      return pm;
1765   }
1766
1767   /**
1768    * Returns the response bean meta if this method returns a {@link Response}-annotated bean.
1769    *
1770    * @return The response bean meta or <jk>null</jk> if it's not a {@link Response}-annotated bean.
1771    */
1772   public ResponseBeanMeta getResponseMeta() { return responseMeta.get(); }

1779   public SerializerSet getSerializers() { return serializers.get(); }

1793   public List<MediaType> getSupportedContentTypes() { return supportedContentTypes.get(); }

1795   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1796   public int hashCode() {
1797      return method.hashCode();
1798   }
1799
1800   private static String toPartValue(Object value) {
1801      return value == null ? null : value.toString();
1802   }
1803
1804   private UrlPathMatch matchPattern(RestSession call) {
1805      UrlPathMatch pm = null;
1806      for (var pp : getPathMatchers())
1807         if (pm == null)
1808            pm = pp.match(call.getUrlPath());
1809      return pm;
1810   }
1811
1812   /**
1813    * Identifies if this method can process the specified call.
1814    *
1815    * <p>
1816    * To process the call, the following must be true:
1817    * <ul>
1818    *    <li>Path pattern must match.
1819    *    <li>Matchers (if any) must match.
1820    * </ul>
1821    *
1822    * @param session The call to check.
1823    * @return
1824    *    One of the following values:
1825    *    <ul>
1826    *       <li><c>0</c> - Path doesn't match.
1827    *       <li><c>1</c> - Path matched but matchers did not.
1828    *       <li><c>2</c> - Matches.
1829    *    </ul>
1830    */
1831   protected int match(RestSession session) {
1832
1833      var pm = matchPattern(session);
1834
1835      if (pm == null)
1836         return 0;
1837
1838      var rm = getRequiredMatchers();
1839      var om = getOptionalMatchers();
1840      if (rm.length == 0 && om.length == 0) {
1841         session.urlPathMatch(pm);  // Cache so we don't have to recalculate.
1842         return 2;
1843      }
1844
1845      try {
1846         var req = session.getRequest();
1847
1848         // If the method implements matchers, test them.
1849         for (var m : rm)
1850            if (! m.matches(req))
1851               return 1;
1852         if (om.length > 0) {
1853            var matches = false;
1854            for (var m : om)
1855               matches |= m.matches(req);
1856            if (! matches)
1857               return 1;
1858      }
1859
1860         session.urlPathMatch(pm);  // Cache so we don't have to recalculate.
1861         return 2;
1862      } catch (Exception e) {
1863         throw new InternalServerError(e);
1864      }
1865   }
1866
1867   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1868   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1869      return super.properties()
1870         .a(PROP_defaultRequestFormData, getDefaultRequestFormData())
1871         .a(PROP_defaultRequestHeaders, getDefaultRequestHeaders())
1872         .a(PROP_defaultRequestQueryData, getDefaultRequestQueryData())
1873         .a(PROP_httpMethod, getHttpMethod());
1874   }
1875
1876   RestConverter[] getConverters() { return converters.get(); }
1877
1878   RestGuard[] getGuards() { return guards.get(); }
1879
1880   RestOpInvoker getMethodInvoker() { return methodInvoker.get(); }
1881
1882   RestOpInvoker[] getPostCallMethods() { return postCallMethods.get(); }
1883
1884   RestOpInvoker[] getPreCallMethods() { return preCallMethods.get(); }
1885   
1886   private static String joinnlFirstNonEmptyArray(String[]...s) {
1887      for (var ss : s)
1888         if (ss.length > 0)
1889            return joinnl(ss);
1890      return null;
1891   }
1892
1893   @SuppressWarnings({
1894      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type parameter is verified by caller context.
1895   })
1896   private static <T> Class<? extends T>[] classArray(Class<? extends T> value) {
1897      return (Class<? extends T>[])new Class<?>[] { value };
1898   }

1901}
